generated_oml:
instance DS18S20TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer sensors for real-time temperature monitoring in thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20TemperatureSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizerEnabler, StateEstimatorEnabler, FaultDetectorEnabler
]

instance ThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal transfer dynamics model for precise parameter estimation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizerEnabler, StateEstimatorEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance EnvironmentalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Environmental conditions model for thermal system simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance ScipyOptimizerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy optimization library for model calibration and optimization functions"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService, CalibrationService
]

instance StateEstimatorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "State estimation processes to determine system states from incomplete data using sensor inputs"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance FaultDetectorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Fault detection mechanisms processing sensor data for anomaly identification"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation capabilities for replicating physical twin behavior under current conditions"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance RabbitMQCommunicationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ for communication synchronization between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance SupervisoryControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Supervisory controllers for implementing control functions in thermal system"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlFunctionsService
]

instance RaspberryPi4Controller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B as the central controller for thermal incubator system"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed for temperature regulation in thermal incubator system"
]

instance AirCirculationFan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan for air circulation in thermal incubator system"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorBox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Insulated box housing thermal control components in incubator system"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Laboratory or industrial environment for thermal incubator system"
    base:contains RaspberryPi4Controller, Heatbed, AirCirculationFan, DS18S20TemperatureSensor, ThermalIncubatorBox
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitoring services to assess safety and operational optimality through sensor data analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, OptimalityViolationInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization via algorithmic techniques to improve operational efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlAction
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation processes determining system states from incomplete data"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateEstimateInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection mechanisms identifying system anomalies"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation capabilities to model physical twin behavior under current operating conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms updating CPS and environmental models with real-time sensor data for precise parameter estimation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelParameterUpdateInsight
]

instance ControlFunctionsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Control functions implemented through supervisory controllers for thermal regulation"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureRegulationAction
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of safety parameter violations in thermal system"
]

instance OptimalityViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of operational optimality violations in thermal system"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights on future temperature behavior based on current conditions"
]

instance SystemStateEstimateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated system state parameters based on sensor data and model"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of faults in temperature sensors or heating elements"
]

instance ModelParameterUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Updated model parameters based on sensor data for accurate simulation"
]

instance OptimalControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of heatbed power to maintain optimal temperature"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TemperatureRegulationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting heatbed and fan operations based on sensor feedback"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin integrates modelling, simulation, monitoring, and optimisation technologies. Components include calibration algorithms updating models with sensor data, monitors checking system performance and safety, and human or algorithmic interventions when violations are detected."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is maintained through calibration algorithms that update parameters using sensor data to ensure alignment with the Physical Twin's behavior. Monitoring systems validate model outputs against safety and optimization criteria, detecting deviations that prompt corrective interventions."
]
